steps.title: Find the highest table value
steps.content: The statement asks for the month with the highest number of housing starts in the first four months of 2022. The table's maximum value is 1,803 thousand.

steps.title: Compare the lower months
steps.content: B is lower at 1,713 thousand, C is lower at 1,669 thousand, and D is lower at 1,771 thousand. The statement must use the 1,803-thousand maximum. The answer is A.
